  "rationale": "ACI 318 requires adequate concrete cover to protect reinforcing steel from corrosion and ensure structural performance. ACI 117 establishes placement tolerances for rebar, and placing drawings specify required cover. Bars touching formwork or ground fail to meet these requirements, creating a durability and compliance defect that must be corrected before the concrete is placed.",
